
============= Question 2: RSA Implementation ================

[Part a & b] Generating 512-bit prime p and q...
p = d0d1a4f81f1ac63dbd60cedf8a5170ea263b72e67cc5507096d7ab54882a35e333a773dbeba8484d630262bcd1db42711e8c8cf04742ab424876fa8715ddefcf
q = 8e871ad67157802161d9ed3a2986d5eb2f20e344642cc58584901bf9c38a65eb70db3726506d62424287af4d36d779e4e3664b10ecc52865911ebd77f1ef2ec5

[Part d] Setting n = p*q and computing d = e^-1 mod phi(n)...
n = 74427df3d68e453c257f7781a0e46bd3bddcbf3ca572859fedf3fa555a23e221b46fe4bb71e24c294658099bead30c4acb75e647ab321bdb331df24f29a81f86a8cb769cf9507aaad851819b946edae5e5d0324fa398cb5ee2a69fd0d56d946697eab93f426450389b508f9ed7b6d7d17cee5ad62bfbc56591beb50f7621bc4b
e = 65537
d = 11fce7b7fe8e6cafedad57343b4c9c525aa1f904cd24770053b4d81ab4a3b0ad3e59c1ae2ee4b09c024244da56eee88bfa06f7e646daadecb07005b9b1dc4d64360505bbd205ef5977fdc9f95a6271ee4e2b5ef86115a223e0101d37b54f65473d65f02e08f7ca31e6351be11656b059dea16390c7fc7a7ebc2bbb5bfb762421

[Part e] Textbook RSA Encryption & Decryption...
Original Message (m):
4ef0929f0be53499be0acfcc95a0345c57e46d7a59d9d40e60389329b4ac21b393a36f9b6caaca92460cece8f9f16566c07395c4032a67caec8120071d890ca2bf4af7d3e44aeb6e35e94616b3fa7a48c24f4a54e23bd9bfddf4da7911af782d6338b3939915df1bea7358b485efa984869a93f7045990840578e1ca52b9a6c7

Ciphertext (c = m^e mod n):
238e39731b66b3db21c642037caf8acaa4f36f2cbe83a4000217b0561368314a3e755a422b099ecbee508f571f362e3a16c852ae9a1005b00b742c137f4b6d05092b1c6fda4d9c177a0433776d42bf11b5cb2a2fb8c30ea1d197d72b921b9a18eb7f97c698b147805238f5c3906d55b17ef9ac6724976703583f7b649e29ff5f

Decrypted Message (m' = c^d mod n):
4ef0929f0be53499be0acfcc95a0345c57e46d7a59d9d40e60389329b4ac21b393a36f9b6caaca92460cece8f9f16566c07395c4032a67caec8120071d890ca2bf4af7d3e44aeb6e35e94616b3fa7a48c24f4a54e23bd9bfddf4da7911af782d6338b3939915df1bea7358b485efa984869a93f7045990840578e1ca52b9a6c7

Success! The decrypted message matches the original message.
